evals.prompt: Хочу добавить уведомления пользователям когда их задача переходит в статус in_review
evals.expected_output: Routes to Product agent with request_type feature_idea

assertions.text: Output contains valid routing JSON with mode field

evals.prompt: Architect completed handoff with status produced for ARCH-15, recommends Builder. What's next?
evals.expected_output: Routes to Spec Reviewer (quality loop), overrides Builder recommendation

assertions.text: Recognizes quality loop is required (overrides Builder recommendation)
workflow_state preserves task_id TASK-15 and artifact_id ARCH-15
Does not route directly to Builder

evals.prompt: Нужно переписать весь pipeline на новую архитектуру
evals.expected_output: Escalates to user with clear reasons
